_publications._publicationTitle: Hexokinase 2 displacement from mitochondria-associated membranes prompts Ca

_contextSnippet: We observe that intratumor injections of either cl‐HK2pep or entire HK2pep significantly decrease the volume of allograft‐injected colon cancer cells
details: Intratumor injections of cl-HK2pep or HK2pep significantly decrease volume of allograft-injected colon cancer cells
